mapper.select: select count(*) from score s left join work w on s.work_id = w.id left join course c on c.id=w.course_id where s.work_status=0 and c.teacher_id=#{teacherId}
select count(*) from score s left join work w on s.work_id = w.id left join course c on c.id=w.course_id where s.work_status=1 and c.teacher_id=#{teacherId}
select count(*) from score s left join work w on s.work_id = w.id left join course c on c.id=w.course_id where s.work_status=1 and s.score between 0 and 59 and c.teacher_id=#{teacherId}
select count(*) from score s left join work w on s.work_id = w.id left join course c on c.id=w.course_id where s.work_status=1 and s.score between 60 and 69 and c.teacher_id=#{teacherId}
select count(*) from score s left join work w on s.work_id = w.id left join course c on c.id=w.course_id where s.work_status=1 and s.score between 70 and 79 and c.teacher_id=#{teacherId}
select count(*) from score s left join work w on s.work_id = w.id left join course c on c.id=w.course_id where s.work_status=1 and s.score between 80 and 89 and c.teacher_id=#{teacherId}
select count(*) from score s left join work w on s.work_id = w.id left join course c on c.id=w.course_id where s.work_status=1 and s.score between 90 and 100 and c.teacher_id=#{teacherId}
